items.name: Heavy Juggernaut Combat Helmet - Black
items.description:
More recolor in the group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about
Made With Ema123
The D1-VANGUARD division presents the "Titan" helmet — designed for the operative who considers a direct hit a minor workplace inconvenience. This military-grade ballistic shell features an integrated triple-lens recon sensor array, reinforced armored plating, and high-impact filtration canisters, built for the toxin-filled warzones of the lower sectors. Whether you're a frontline juggernaut or spec-ops scout, wear it for the protection; keep it for the silhouette that says, "I'm here to finish the job and clock out early."

items.name: Nr. 24N Night Infiltration Helmet Attachment
items.description:
Designed for the Nr. 19 Steel Helmet, the Nr. 24 Camo Helmet Attachment comes in several patterns, providing extra concealment in different environments and mounting points for foliage or scrim. Due to the added conealment of the helmet cover, it has seen increasing adoption by units across the Armiya Vysaarii.

This example is in the Night Infiltration Pattern, developed in 11,924 to provide troops added concealment during nighttime operations, as well as in urban or wooded environments.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Get the helmet this goes with here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/14388724515/Nr-19-Steel-Helmet
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
